issues.title: App boot path broken by model-only deletion
issues.attack: signals.py/admin.py import Contact/Offer/ProjectStatus — app won't boot if models deleted without fixing imports
issues.response: Verified: apps.py→signals.py→Contact/ProjectStatus/ActionType(TextChoices). Phase 1 scope expanded to include boot path cleanup.

issues.title: ActionType name collision (TextChoices vs BaseModel)
issues.attack: Existing ActionType(TextChoices) at models.py:594 will be shadowed by new ActionType(BaseModel)
issues.response: Verified: AutoAction model references old ActionType enum. T1.1 updated to explicitly remove old enum.

issues.title: User FK instead of settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL
issues.attack: ActionItem FK uses User directly, project uses custom user model
issues.response: All existing FKs use settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL. Plan shorthand was ambiguous. Fixed to explicit.

issues.title: Interview unique constraint meaningless with OneToOne
issues.attack: (action_item, round) is redundant since OneToOne already makes action_item unique
issues.response: Correct. Replace DB constraint with clean() validation on action_item__application + round.

issues.title: No action_type validation for output models
issues.attack: Any ActionItem can have Submission/Interview/MeetingRecord regardless of action_type
issues.response: Valid structurally, but Phase 1 = schema only. Added constraint documentation to T1.5/T1.6/T1.7. Validation in Phase 2.

issues.title: No CheckConstraint for Project invariants
issues.attack: closed_at/status/result can be inconsistent without DB constraints

issues.title: Seed reverse_func contradictory
issues.attack: Description says all().delete() but code filters by codes. Also PROTECT FK blocks deletion.
issues.response: Code example correct, description wrong. Fixed description to match code. Added PROTECT caveat.

issues.title: Missing Meta cleanup for deleted fields
issues.response: Verified: Interview.Meta.ordering = ['submission', 'round']. Added Meta cleanup step to T1.5/T1.6/T1.7.

issues.title: Seed count confusion (심사 8 vs 7)
issues.response: impl-plan says '23개' consistently without per-phase breakdown. The '심사 8개' was a review prompt error, not a plan error.

issues.title: submit_to_pm missing from suggests_next
issues.attack: No next action suggested after PM review completion
issues.response: Valid concern for seed completeness. Added directive to T1.12: define suggests_next for all 23 types.

issues.title: DropReason insufficient (position_cancelled)
issues.attack: 4 enum may not cover high-frequency drop reasons like position cancellation
issues.response: FINAL-SPEC 9.4 explicitly caps at 4 enum with 'no over-classification'. Plan implements spec faithfully.

issues.title: STATE_FROM_ACTION_TYPE mapping not defined
issues.attack: current_state property references undefined constant mapping
issues.response: Added skeleton mapping for protected 4 types + key types. Remaining = 'in_progress' fallback + Phase 2 TODO.

issues.title: Phase derivation edge case documentation
issues.attack: Droped submitted applications and phase recalculation needs explicit documentation
issues.response: Behavior is per FINAL-SPEC 6.2. Added phase field docstring referencing derivation rules.

issues.title: Missing index for current_state query
issues.response: Added Index(['application', 'status', '-completed_at']) to T1.4 ActionItem Meta.

issues.title: ActionOutputKind NONE notation incomplete
issues.response: Fixed T1.2 to match FINAL-SPEC notation: NONE = '', '없음'.
